segments.original_text: この辺りはもう本当にさすがのレモゾナといいますか

segments.text: The character control is really refined now
segments.original_text: さすがの使い込みになってきますが

segments.text: Beautiful read, doesn't miss that opening!
segments.original_text: このチャンス逃さなくてさすがですね

full_text: Lemozamora's showing truly masterful spacing here. The character control is really refined now. Nice dash attack! He makes it back! Ledge! Beautiful read, doesn't miss that opening!
